case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. BL LOGISTICS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100209559) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $678.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 73978193) AS TO DEFENDANT BL LOGISTICS LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100209559) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BL LOGISTICS LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-13-2024
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2024 CONTINUED TO OCT-29-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2024 CONTINUED TO JUN-25-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2024 CONTINUED TO AUG-27-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73404614) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED MAY-09-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BL LOGISTICS LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-29-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100209559) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 73438123) AS TO DEFENDANT BL LOGISTICS LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 73846085) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BL LOGISTICS LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73978193) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73846085) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION DOF ERIC J. JUN RE ATTORNEYS FEES AND CALCULATION OF INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 73978193) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BL LOGISTICS LLC $11,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,621.80 INTEREST, $678.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,400.75, SEE SCANNED DOC
